title: AlphaFold co-creator John Jumper is leaving DeepMind for Anthropic
friendlyTitle: A major DeepMind scientist is joining Anthropic
summary: Reuters reports that John Jumper, a Google DeepMind scientist known for co-creating AlphaFold and sharing the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry, is leaving DeepMind to join Anthropic. The move follows other high-profile AI researcher departures amid intense competition for frontier talent.
friendlySummary: John Jumper, one of the people behind AlphaFold, is leaving Google DeepMind for Anthropic. AlphaFold is one of the best-known examples of AI helping science.
whyItMatters: Talent movement is a leading signal for where the next AI-for-science and frontier-model bets may concentrate. For businesses, it reinforces that top AI labs are competing not only on products, but on research depth and speed of execution.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Where top researchers go can shape future AI products and discoveries. It shows how intense the competition between AI labs has become.
